blocks.content: The gym was different. More lights, a real DJ setup, round tables along the sides instead of bleacher seating. Someone had taken it seriously. Eli approved.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: They upgraded the production value. I want that acknowledged.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Come on. There's a photo booth.
She pulled Marcus by the hand. Eli followed, already scanning the room. That left Kit and Daisy at the edge of the floor.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Eli's going to bring up the DJ thing all night.

She led him to the floor. The song was fast and they didn't try to make it mean anything — just moved, the way they always had, Daisy making fun of his footwork and Kit doing it worse on purpose just to make her laugh. And she did laugh.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You've been feeling the wrong music for four years.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: And yet you keep showing up.
She looked at him. He looked back. The song changed.
